It reduces token count while preserving semantic meaning."}],"\n",["$","h2",null,{"children":"The Problem"}],"\n",["$","p",null,{"children":"Agent context windows are limited (4K–128K tokens). Raw memory dumps consume precious space. a:["$","$L14",null,{"code":"# Automatic compression during sleep\nmem = Memory(aaak_enabled=True)\n\n# Manual compression\ncompressed = mem.compress(memories, target_tokens=500)\n\n# Decompress for detail\noriginals = mem.expand(compressed.kernel_id)\n","language":"python"}]
